note: Official PolyU JUPAS page describes the 2026 entry scheme, awards, curriculum structure and selected subject names, but does not publish stable subject codes or semester-by-semester course rows on the public page. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and BME programme/curriculum pages describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit structure and broad requirement groups for Sports Science and Technology, but the public pages do not publish stable subject codes or a course table for the programme. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and BEEE programme/brochure pages describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit plus 11 training-credit structure, curriculum progression and broad building sciences subjects, but the public pages and image-based brochure do not publish stable subject codes or a course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and ARCH programme page describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit plus 2 training-credit structure, 87-credit major subjects, GUR, free electives, capstone and broad architectural competence areas, but the public pages do not publish stable subject codes or a course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and FSN programme pages describe the 2026 entry scheme, common Year One, two major awards, 120-credit structure, WIE and broad subject areas. The linked programme requirement document redirects to PolyU single sign-on, so the public source does not provide a verifiable coded course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a publicly accessible coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS, School of Nursing programme-structure pages and the 2025 programme pamphlet confirm the five-year Mental Health Nursing curriculum, course areas, clinical practice and graduation credits. The publicly accessible materials list subject names but do not publish a current, complete coded subject table tied to JS3337. Older exchange and examination records cannot be used as the current curriculum. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and HTI pages describe the 2026 entry programme, four-year curriculum progression, 126 academic credits plus 10 clinical/field credits, clinical attachment and current subject names by year. The public subject-information link does not provide a current coded subject table; searchable coded records are from older curricula and cannot be treated as the 2026 curriculum. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.
